product.name: yoose Nose Hair Trimmer, Alloy Rechargeable Nose Hair Trimmer for Men Women, IPX7 Waterproof, Detachable Head, Easy to Clean, Portable Travel Size Nose Trimmers, Dual Edged Blades, Painless, Silver
features: TRIMMING TOOL 2.0 - yoose 2nd Generation Trendy Portable Nose Hair Trimmer - ALLOY EDITION. Alloy build nose trimmer effectively and comfortably removes unwanted hair from nose and ear. One-button design, universal for both men and women. Let you show your handsome and beautiful side anytime and anywhere.

COMPACT TRAVEL SIZE - Mini, portable and can be taken anywhere. Our portable nose trimmer is suitable for home use, road trips, vacations, and business trips. Comes with a dustproof protective cover, making the mens nose hair trimmer more suitable for on-the-go carrying while keeping it clean and hygienic.

WATERPROOF & WASHABLE - IPX7 rated waterproof. Our ear and nose hair trimmer can be used in wet or dry environments. Safe to use in the shower. The whole machine is washable and the cutter head is removable. Easy to clean by rinsing with water.

LONG-LASTING BATTERY LIFE - Removing stray hairs on the go is so easy. The ear nose hair trimmer has a built-in Li-ion battery (350 mAh). Runtime is up to 45 minutes after fully charging the nose trimmer for women. USB-C rechargeable battery, compatible with a variety of adapters and charging methods, easy to charge.

SUPERIOR TRIMMING SYSTEM - This electric nose hair trimmer is equipped with a 10,000 RPM motor that powers the double-edged blades for smooth, precise nose hair removal. The nose trimmer for men 360° captures nose hairs and painlessly trims them to the right length to protect the health of your nose.

HOW TO USE - Fully charge the device before operation. Turn it on, then slowly insert the comfortable tapered tip into your nose or ear. Allow the ear and nose trimmer to trim your hair for at least 60 seconds, then clean the device. yoose Nose Hair Trimmer is not designed to completely remove nose hair. Rather, it is designed to trim nose hair to the proper length. Protect the health of your nasal without compromising on aesthetics.
